nasb.text: The sons of Gad according to their families: of Zephon, the family of the Zephonites; of Haggi, the family of the Haggites; of Shuni, the family of the Shunites;

esv.text: The sons of Gad according to their clans: of Zephon, the clan of the Zephonites; of Haggi, the clan of the Haggites; of Shuni, the clan of the Shunites;

cnv.text: 迦得子孫，按著家族，屬洗分的，有洗分家族；屬哈基的，有哈基家族；屬書尼的，有書尼家族；

ccb.text: 迦得的子孙有洗分族、哈基族、书尼族、
